parameters.content:
## Portfolio Market Report

**Triggers:** Webhook `POST /portfolio-market-report` + Cron (weekdays 08:00)

**Flow:** Validate → Process All Holdings → HTML report → notifications → logs

**OpenRouter:** uses `$env.OPENROUTER_API_KEY`. If credits are missing (HTTP 402), rule-based BUY/HOLD/SELL signals are generated from price/P&L data instead.

**APIs:** Finnhub (quotes/news), Alpha Vantage (fundamentals), MarketAux (news fallback), OpenRouter (optional AI).

Alpha Vantage free tier: ~13s delay between symbols is built in.
